results.rendered_html:
avīja -jaka(abīja)
1 Seedless;  Ms. 10. 71. 
2 Impotent;  Ms. 9. 79. 
3 Having no prime cause.
— jaḥ Restraint, controlling the mental passions.
— jā Vine plant.
— jaṃ
1 Bad seed, bad grain; ˚vikrayin  Ms. 9. 291. 
2 Absence of seed.
Comp.
— han a. Ved. not pernicious to men.
